name: payment-webhook-casso-unauth
_note: Public route. The casso route dispatches method="vietqr" (legacy alias) -> same VietQR strategy -> same 401 envelope {"error":"Missing webhook authorization","code":"invalid-token","request_id":"<uuid>"} on both backends; confirms the legacy route name is wired identically. request_id (per-request uuid) is ignored; error+code are deterministic and COMPARED. PREREQUISITE: 'vietqr' MUST be in payment_methods_enabled, else assertEnabled returns 404 (also identical-on-both, but this fixture targets the 401 branch).
